message:
refactor(ui,deps): drop crossterm dependency and adopt native ftui backend

Replace crossterm with the native ftui-runtime backend across the TUI
stack:

- Cargo.toml: remove `crossterm` dep; replace `ftui` crossterm feature
  with `ftui-runtime` (native-backend); keep ftui-extras unchanged.
- src/tui_asciicast.rs: replace `crossterm::terminal::size()` with a
  new `detect_terminal_size()` that reads COLUMNS/LINES env vars then
  falls back to `stty size`, avoiding crossterm at the PTY layer.
  Rewrite `RawModeGuard` to delegate to `ftui_tty::RawModeGuard` on
  unix, removing the manual crossterm enable/disable_raw_mode calls.
- src/ui/ftui_adapter.rs: update re-exports removing SessionOptions and
  TerminalSession (no longer exposed by ftui without crossterm).
- src/ui/app.rs: switch `Program::with_config` to
  `Program::with_native_backend`; add `last_terminal_size: Cell<(u16,
  u16)>` field (updated on Resized events and in view()) so macro
  recorder metadata no longer needs crossterm::terminal::size().
  Overhaul the analytics panel rendering:
  - Add `compact_i64_for_analytics()` for human-friendly large numbers.
  - Add `sparkline_from_values()` to render inline Unicode sparklines.
  - Extract `analytics_tabs_line()` and `analytics_metrics_line()`
    helpers for a richer header with per-view accent colours, a KPI
    ribbon (msgs/api/tools/cost/coverage + sparkline trend), and
    adaptive 1-3 row header layout.
  - Restyle analytics footer with per-view accent colours, styled row
    counters, and separated degradation/loading indicators.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
